summary: Fantastic performance hampered by occasional skip glitches in the recording
review: The reviewer praises the show as otherwise fantastic and highlights the China Doll solo, but notes that a handful of songs suffer from repeated skips that create small jumps forward. The technical flaws are described as bearable yet rough, making the listening experience mixed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; positive comments about musical performance but strong negative feedback on recording skips leads to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Repeated skips (small jumps forward) in several songs, making sections sound rough though overall recording is decent.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing; reviewer only highlights a solo excerpt.
